raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.3,"R1.5":0.0,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.2","R1.3","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"rationale":{"R1.2":"The abstention mechanism (entropy threshold, calibration target, false-execute rate guarantee) and the comparative evaluation contain inferential steps whose correctness a 'check' would naturally cover.","R1.3":"Four specific quantitative claims (91% abstention, 88% unambiguous accuracy, +27 pt aggregate gain, +14 pt ablation gain) need to be traced back to the experimental setup and benchmark design to confirm alignment.","R1.6":"If 'check this' is primarily a proofread or draft-review request, writing polish becomes load-bearing; the prose is dense in places and contains hedges ('to our knowledge') that may require tightening."},"clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Should I focus on substantive accuracy—verifying the logical consistency of the abstention rule and whether the reported numbers support the claimed conclusions—or on writing quality and clarity of the prose?"}

rationale.R1.2: The abstention mechanism (entropy threshold, calibration target, false-execute rate guarantee) and the comparative evaluation contain inferential steps whose correctness a 'check' would naturally cover.
rationale.R1.3: Four specific quantitative claims (91% abstention, 88% unambiguous accuracy, +27 pt aggregate gain, +14 pt ablation gain) need to be traced back to the experimental setup and benchmark design to confirm alignment.
rationale.R1.6: If 'check this' is primarily a proofread or draft-review request, writing polish becomes load-bearing; the prose is dense in places and contains hedges ('to our knowledge') that may require tightening.

parsed.clarification_question: Should I focus on substantive accuracy—verifying the logical consistency of the abstention rule and whether the reported numbers support the claimed conclusions—or on writing quality and clarity of the prose?
